items.name: 屯田兵屋
items.description: 指定番号第1号。川津万次郎氏宅（兵屋番号67番）を復元。明治32年北海道最後の屯田入植による兵屋。平成19年改修工事完成。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a tonden colonist-militia dwelling. It is municipally designated in Shibetsu City, dated 1 September 2005, and located in Fudō Park, Nishishibetsu-chō.

items.name: 上士別遺跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 指定番号第2号。縄文時代前期（推定7,000年前）の住居址。昭和46年発掘調査で平地式住居址4基、平地式貼床住居址1基等発見。

en.description_en: A monument designated as a historic site. It is municipally designated in Shibetsu City, dated 1 September 2005, and located in Kamishibetsu-chō.

items.name: 祖神の松
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 指定番号第3号。幹回り7.5メートル、直径2.4メートル、樹高18メートルのイチイの銘木。樹齢1千数百年と推定。

en.name_en: Pine of the Ancestral Deity (Oyagami no Matsu)
en.description_en: A monument designated as a natural monument. It is municipally designated in Shibetsu City, dated 1 September 2005, and located in the Gakuden prefectural forest, Nishishibetsu-chō.

items.name: 瑞穂獅子舞
items.description: 指定番号第4号。富山県からの移住者による越中獅子舞。大正5年奥士別神社祭典に奉納されたのが始まり。

en.description_en: An intangible cultural property, a lion dance. It is municipally designated in Shibetsu City, dated 1 September 2005, and located in Asahi-chō Chūō.
